title: cayratia verrucosa
intro: Cayratia verrucosa, also known as the hairy vine or hairy snail vine, is a type of plant that belongs to the Vitaceae family. It is a climber with hairy stems and leaves, native to tropical Asia. The medicinal properties of Cayratia verrucosa include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions, and its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and it can be prepared into herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
